name: ctalos-agent
description: CtalosAgent (Enterprise Agent) - 企业级中控 Agent 系统

scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:api && pnpm run typecheck:web
scripts.test: pnpm run test:python && pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:web
scripts.test:api: pnpm --filter api-server build && cd apps/api-server && npx vitest run
scripts.test:real: cd apps/agent-runtime && PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_provider_real.py tests/test_end_to_end_real_llm.py tests/test_embedding_service.py tests/test_github_real.py -v
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api-server build && pnpm --filter web-console build
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec postgres psql -U agent -d agent_db -f /migrations/001_initial_schema.sql && docker compose exec postgres psql -U agent -d agent_db -f /migrations/002_state_machine_subagents.sql && docker compose exec postgres psql -U agent -d agent_db -f /migrations/003_sessions_and_memory_scope.sql && docker compose exec postgres psql -U agent -d agent_db -f /migrations/004_workflow_states.sql
